# kanidm_person (Data Source)

Reads a Kanidm person account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Username of the person to look up.

### Read-Only

- `displayname` (String) Display name of the person.
- `legalname` (String) Legal name.
- `mail` (List of String) Email addresses.
- `unix_gid` (Number) Unix GID number.
- `unix_shell` (String) Login shell.
